nasb.text: And He *took with Him Peter and James and John, and began to be very distressed and troubled.

esv.text: And he took with him Peter and James and John, and began to be greatly distressed and troubled.

cnv.text: 他帶了彼得、雅各、約翰一起去，就驚懼起來，非常難過。

ccb.text: 于是耶稣带着彼得、雅各和约翰向前走。祂觉得极其难过，非常伤痛，

csbs.text: 他带了彼得、雅各和约翰一起去。这时候，他开始忧惧起来，极其难过，
